data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. ALTRUISM won comfortably last time scoring by 6 lengths at this track after jumping from box 3 (21.26). Has the squeeze box to overcome and will need the breaks early. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minor placings. Well placed and will be tough to beat. 8. APPLEBY ROAD is long overdue for a win and in super consistent form, jumping from this box to place last time at Wanganui Straight (17.48), making it three straight minors. Can measure up. 2. TINY KIWI jumped from this box and went down narrowly when a 0.7 lengths second (19.10) in a Class 2 at Manukau over 318m latest. This tougher but has very good box speed and expected to be in the finish. 3. PORTLAND FLEET has strong claims after a top-three finish at this track and distance last time out. Does meet an easier field today with the down grade.","runners":[4,8,2,3],"exclusive":false}
